'''padogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracunculosis|dracunculosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracunculosis|dracunculosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| padogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædegeth|pædegeth]] || [[word:pædegej|pædegej]] || [[word:pædegesh|pædegesh]] || [[word:pædege|pædege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padodogoth|padodogoth]] || [[word:padodogoj|padodogoj]] || [[word:padodogosh|padodogosh]] || [[word:padodogo|padodogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padogoth|padogoth]] || [[word:padogoj|padogoj]] || [[word:padogosh|padogosh]] || [[word:padogo|padogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padofgoth|padofgoth]] || [[word:padofgoj|padofgoj]] || [[word:padofgosh|padofgosh]] || [[word:padofgof|padofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padogotho|padogotho]] || [[word:padogojo|padogojo]] || [[word:padogosho|padogosho]] || [[word:padogoko|padogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padogoth|padogoth]] || [[word:padogoj|padogoj]] || [[word:padogosh|padogosh]] || [[word:padogo|padogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padogothol|padogothol]] || [[word:padogojol|padogojol]] || [[word:padogoshol|padogoshol]] || [[word:padogokol|padogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padogothotho|padogothotho]] || [[word:padogojojo|padogojojo]] || [[word:padogoshosho|padogoshosho]] || [[word:padogoko|padogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padogothon|padogothon]] || [[word:padogojon|padogojon]] || [[word:padogoshon|padogoshon]] || [[word:padogokon|padogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padogothoro|padogothoro]] || [[word:padogojoro|padogojoro]] || [[word:padogoshoro|padogoshoro]] || [[word:padogokoro|padogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
